_comment_blocked_patterns: These patterns are ALWAYS blocked, even with an active override. They represent catastrophic operations that should never be executed by an AI agent.
_comment_blocked_paths_write: Write operations to these paths are blocked unless an override is active. Customize for your system.
_comment_allowed_sudo: Only these commands are allowed after 'sudo'. Adjust to your workflow. Everything else is blocked unless an override grants it.
_comment_require_confirmation: Commands matching these patterns trigger a desktop notification (via notify-send) so you know what's being installed.
_comment_prompt_injection_keywords: Commands containing these keywords trigger a warning (not a block). Helps detect prompt injection attempts embedded in file contents or command arguments.
